boundary_notes: Candidate memory is not Perspective state.
Lifecycle status is derived review context, not source of truth.
Calibration context is diagnostic, not readiness authority.
Logical shape context is structure-only, not proof.
Feedback-to-Rule context is candidate-only, not rule mutation.
Temporal handoff context is diagnostic, not authority.
Target-agent packet profile is advisory, not prompt execution.
Source refs are lineage pointers, not proof.
Source refs must be public-safe symbolic refs.
Store paths remain constrained by the #771 route allowlist.
UI is read-only and does not perform automatic background writes.

sample_sections.title: Foundation Status
sample_sections.summary: Foundation status identifies completed roadmap rails and keeps product-write parked.
sample_sections.boundary_note: Foundation status is planning context only.

sample_sections.title: Lifecycle Summary
sample_sections.summary: Lifecycle summaries group candidate review states without becoming truth.
sample_sections.boundary_note: Lifecycle status is derived review context, not source of truth.

sample_sections.title: Calibration Summary
sample_sections.summary: Calibration diagnostics surface risk cues for operator review.
sample_sections.boundary_note: Calibration context is diagnostic, not readiness authority.

sample_sections.title: Logical Claim Shape Summary
sample_sections.summary: Logical shape previews show bounded structure and unresolved relationships.
sample_sections.boundary_note: Logical shape context is structure-only, not proof.

sample_sections.title: Feedback-to-Rule Summary
sample_sections.summary: Feedback-to-Rule candidates summarize repeated feedback without mutating rules.
sample_sections.boundary_note: Feedback-to-Rule context is candidate-only, not rule mutation.

sample_sections.title: Temporal Handoff Summary
sample_sections.summary: Temporal handoff diagnostics summarize handoff completeness and omissions.
sample_sections.boundary_note: Temporal handoff context is diagnostic, not authority.

sample_sections.title: Target-Agent Packet Profile Summary
sample_sections.summary: Target-agent profiles summarize packet shape for human, ChatGPT, Codex, and dogfood review.
sample_sections.boundary_note: Target-agent packet profile is advisory, not prompt execution.

sample_sections.title: Review Memory Snapshot Summary
sample_sections.summary: Review memory rows are bounded metadata summaries loaded through GET only when requested.

sample_sections.title: Authority Boundary
sample_sections.summary: The page displays summaries only and grants no execution, write, promotion, or product authority.
sample_sections.boundary_note: UI is read-only and does not perform automatic background writes.

sample_sections.title: Deferred Work
sample_sections.summary: Runtime intake, provider extraction, retrieval, promotion, durable state, Git Ledger, and product-write reentry remain deferred.
